description.source: Must do's or highly recommended steps before you launch a project
description.target: Must do's or highly recommended steps before you launch a project

body:0002.source: Before you publish a project, review this checklist to ensure nothing critical is missed. Completing these steps makes your project more engaging, easier to manage, and clearer for participants.
body:0002.target: Before you publish a project, review this checklist to ensure nothing critical is missed. Completing these steps makes your project more engaging, easier to manage, and clearer for participants.

body:0005.source: You avoid rework after launch (e.g., editing access rights or fixing missing descriptions).
body:0005.target: You avoid rework after launch (e.g., editing access rights or fixing missing descriptions).

body:0006.source: Responsibilities are clear, someone is accountable for each aspect of the project.
body:0006.target: Responsibilities are clear, someone is accountable for each aspect of the project.

body:0008.source: Double-check if all the user data relevant for your project is a required registration field
body:0008.target: Double-check if all the user data relevant for your project is a required registration field

body:0009.source: User info relevant for your project should be asked during the platform registration flow.
body:0009.target: User info relevant for your project should be asked during the platform registration flow.

body:0010.source: Customize project tags, areas and statuses
body:0010.target: Customize project tags, areas and statuses

body:0011.source: Review and adjust tags, areas and ensure status handling is clear.
body:0011.target: Review and adjust tags, areas and ensure status handling is clear.

body:0012.source: Grant access to the right groups of users
body:0012.target: Grant access to the right groups of users

body:0013.source: Also check if the info you need is asked during the platform registration flow.
body:0013.target: Also check if the info you need is asked during the platform registration flow.

body:0014.source: Add a timeline to your projects and a description to each project phase
body:0014.target: Add a timeline to your projects and a description to each project phase

body:0015.source: Don't leave the description of a timeline phase empty.
body:0015.target: Don't leave the description of a timeline phase empty.

body:0016.source: Customize the input form (for ideation projects)
body:0016.target: Customize the input form (for ideation projects)

body:0017.source: You can customize the way to collect input in an ideation project.
body:0017.target: You can customize the way to collect input in an ideation project.

body:0019.source: You can change the zoom level of and add layers to the map that shows in your project.
body:0019.target: You can change the zoom level of and add layers to the map that shows in your project.

body:0020.source: Enhance project design with Content Builder
body:0020.target: Enhance project design with Content Builder

body:0021.source: Use flexible layouts, multi-media content and third-party embeds in your project descriptions.
body:0021.target: Use flexible layouts, multi-media content and third-party embeds in your project descriptions.

body:0023.source: Define which automated emails people should or should not receive from your project.
body:0023.target: Define which automated emails people should or should not receive from your project.

body:0025.source: Distribute responsibilities internally. Each project can have its own manager.
body:0025.target: Distribute responsibilities internally. Each project can have its own manager.
